ab: na sekavililj aken a sema gakku ta kadjaman.
en: I was late for school this morning.

ab: inika na kemacu aken tua kabang, ta vaik aken a sema gakku.
ch: 去學校的時候，我忘了帶書包。
en: When I was going to school, I forgot to bring my backpack.

ab: neka nu ku kinacu a nanemaneman.
en: I didn’t bring anything with me.

ab: nu kitulutulu amen, pacun amen a meseljang ta laqulj katua ku salasaladj.
ch: 上課的時候，我和同學一起看課本。
en: During class, I and my classmates read the textbook together.

ab: nu siking amen, pasedjaman aken ta inpic katua siquliqulip na ku salasaladj.
ch: 考試的時候，同學借我筆和橡皮擦。
en: During the exam, a classmate lent me a pen and an eraser.

ab: qivu ti sinsi tjanuaken a mayatucu, “djamau anga paceged nu tjaivililj mayanga sekavililj!”
ch: 老師跟我說：「下次早點起床，不要再遲到了!」
en: The teacher told me, “Wake up earlier next time and don’t be late again!”
